channel.title: security on drpaneas
channel.description: Recent content in security on drpaneas

item.title: How We Put OpenClaw on Developer Sandbox
item.description: OpenClaw is now on Developer Sandbox. You click a card, provide an API key, and get a personal AI assistant running on OpenShift. Under the hood, that assistant runs on OpenClaw, and the core building blocks come from claw-operator. That part is the boring story. The harder story is the one I actually care about. The first question I asked was not “does the demo work?” It was this: if I compromise the agent, can I steal the credential?
